text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 39 

DSBLTY_BLND_IND 

LABEL: Disability Indicator — Blind — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary is blind or has serious difficulty seeing, even when wearing 
glasses; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: DSBLTY_BLND_IND 

LONG NAME: DSBLTY_BLND_IND 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
